betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Space Station Deployment§f quest is the §6launch milestone§f that turns a built station into an orbital outpost. It is not an item quest — it requires the player to compile a station via the §6Space Station Assembler§f (10034), retrieve the resulting §6Space Station Container§f, load it into a rocket's §6Satellite Bay§f, and launch.

§6Production Path (questline step)§f:
- Step 1: Build a station structure with the §6Space Station Assembler§f (10034)
- Step 2: Right-click the assembler to compile — receive 1x §6Space Station Container§f + 1x §6Space Station ID Chip§f
- Step 3: Build a §6chemical launch rocket§f with at least one §6Satellite Bay§f (advancedrocketry:loader:1) block in its frame
- Step 4: Load the §6Space Station Container§f into the Satellite Bay
- Step 5: Launch the rocket — when the rocket reaches orbit, the container auto-deploys and the station blocks spawn in space

The §6Space Station ID Chip§f is the §6return key§f for the deployed station: insert it into a §6Guidance Computer§f (10028) on any future rocket to set the station as the destination. The chip is also used in the §6Space Station Assembler§f to add §6expansion modules§f to an existing station.

This quest is the prerequisite for the §6Station Docking Port§f (10036) and the §6Warp Travel§f (10038) chain. It is the most important mid-game milestone because every late-game AR content (warping, gas giant mining, satellite missions) requires an orbital station as a base of operations.

§cWarning§f: Orbiting space stations are in the §cvacuum of space§f — never travel to a station without a fully charged §6Space Suit§f with an §6Airtight Seal§f, or you will instantly suffocate. The atmospheric seal system is unlocked by the §6Atmosphere Analyzer§f (10062) chain.
